issues.sample: While I was driving on freeway, driver side airbag went off and blew off driver visor.  I had no accident. Message on screen before incident said there was an issue with airbag and go to dealership. Earlier that day I had been at dealership for a warranty issue of interior lights

narrative.headline: What 2024 Mini Countryman owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 1 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Air Bags (100% of reports).

issues.sample: While I was driving on freeway, driver side airbag went off and blew off driver visor.  I had no accident. Message on screen before incident said there was an issue with airbag and go to dealership. Earlier that day I had been at dealership for a warranty issue of interior lights
issues.title: Air Bags
